results.title: Spain Folds, Agrees to Boost NATO Payments After U.S. Trade Halt Order
results.description: President Donald Trump told reporters aboard Air Force One that Spain “came back all the way” and agreed to boost NATO payments after he ordered a U.S. trade embargo with the European country over its reluctance to contribute more to the organization. The subject of Spain’s contributions and commitments to NATO — or lack thereof [...] The post Spain Folds, Agrees to Boost NATO Payments After U.S. Trade Halt Order appeared first on CBNC .

results.title: The Platner Problem: Is Political Vetting Broken?
results.description: The vetting process for political candidates has been brought into sharp focus after Graham Platner suspended his Senate campaign in Maine following multiple alarming allegations, including an alleged rape. How did the Democratic Party end up running a candidate with so much personal baggage that the campaign was basically doomed from the start?
